TextENGNew: ``Ahh~!@k@vS07/08/330800052. I finally found you, Rena-chan!``
``Honestly, we've been looking everywhere for you, Rena-chan!@k@vS07/09/330900099. We were worried sick about where you'd gone!``
``Hau...? Hauuu?!``
And so, as it turned out...

The ones who barged in just as everything was wrapping up on a nice note and completely ruined the atmosphere were none other than Tomitake-san and Takano-san, who showed up right after the ceremony ended.
``H-Hau~!!@k@vS07/02/330200368. Keiichi-kun, Mii-chan, save meeeee~~!!``

``How could you be so cold, Rena-chan!@k@vS07/08/330800054. You promised me yesterday, remember!@k@vS07/08/330800055. Look, I even prepared a nurse outfit in your exact size!@k@vS07/08/330800056. Come on, let's have a private photo session, just the two of us!!``
``Nooooooo!!@k@vS07/02/330200370. You're all hot and sticky, so get off meeeee~!!``
``Let go of her, Jirou-san! Can't you see Rena-chan seriously doesn't want this!!``
``You're the one who should let go, Takano-san!@k@vS07/08/330800058. I've finally found my lifelong partner and the ultimate photographic subject!``
``I'm going to fill every last roll of film with shots of Rena-chan in a nurse outfit!@k@vS07/08/330800060. Hau~ I'm taking you hooooome~~!!!``
``Rena-chan has zero interest in filthy male apes like you!``
changeReason: New translation includes 'male' (オス) which the old omitted; the Japanese specifically says オス猿 (male apes).

TextENGNew: ``Isn't that right, Rena-chan?@k@vS07/09/330900103. Starting today, you may call me... O-nee-sama... all right?@k@vS07/09/330900104. Oh my, that won't do. Your tie is all crooked!``
``Nnnngh, both of you, let go of meeeee~!!@k@vS07/02/330200372. Why does this keep happening to me?! Why?!@k@vS07/02/330200373. Uwaaaahhn!!``
``...That has nothing to do with the magatama, so there's really nothing more we can do about it.``

``As a matter of accountability, I believe we ought to hold a demonstration for Rika today -- not only the tickle torture machine, but also the newly developed grindy-grindy machine and the squirmy-squirmy machine.``
``P-please, have mercy! Meep~!!``
Rika-chan fled with tears welling in her eyes, Satoko hot on her heels.
We watched over this rare spectacle with lukewarm amusement -- a complete reversal of their usual dynamic.
``...Hey, Shion.@k@vS07/01/330100407. Those machines of yours... just how devastating are they?``
``Heh heh heh...!@k@vS07/06/330600120. Would you like to find oooout...?``
A chill ran down my spine...!!
changeReason: Old translates the shiver onomatopoeia ぞくぅぅっっ as an exclamation 'Eeek'; new correctly renders it as a physical sensation 'A chill ran down my spine.'

TextENGNew: ``I-I'll pass, thanks...``
